page_metadata.biotools__summary: PHONI (Practical Heuristic ON Incremental matching statistics computation) is a framework supports the currently memory-friendliest way to compute the matching statistics of a pattern on highly-repetitive texts, given that the input text is precomputed with the MONI index-
